missingFromExtract.liveSectionDescription: Hero tabs widget showing 6 product tabs (Portfolio, Quarter plan, Capacitaire, Priorisation, Roadmap, Reporting) with Lottie animations - this is part of the hero visual on live but extracted hero has no imageSrc/visual representation

sections.note: Title, highlight, subtitle, CTAs and bullets all match. Live also has a 'PPM nouvelle génération' tag and an interactive Lottie tabs visual not represented in the JSON, but the textual content is faithful.
Title and 5 client logos match exactly.
All 4 stats with values and labels match live.
Title and 4 items match live (with bold formatting stripped, which is acceptable).
Flash Report - title, subtitle (tag 'Gain de temps immédiat'), body, 4 bullets and image all match.
Roadmap COMEX - matches live, reversed=true correct (image left).
Décisions pilotables - all fields match, reversed correctly set.
Title, subtitle, 3 items with icons and labels (heading + description merged via em dash) match live.
Both testimonials with text, name, role, company, avatar, linkedin URL match live faithfully.
4 badges with labels combining heading + subtext via em dash, icons match.
Partner integration logos - 6 logos match live.
4 steps with titles and descriptions match live.
Final CTA section with title, subtitle and 2 cards (démo + vidéo) with proper labels, hrefs and icons match live.

audit.summary: Extraction is highly faithful to live page. All 18 sections present on live are reproduced with correct content, canonical fields and proper image assignments. Only minor gap: the hero on live includes a Lottie-animated tabs widget showcasing 6 product views, which is not represented as an imageSrc in the extracted hero (acceptable since it's an interactive Lottie animation, not a static product mockup). All feature-split images point to real product webp mockups, not icons. Testimonial fields (name/role/company/avatar/linkedin) are canonically assigned. Stats use value+label canonically.
